rationale: The citing paper references Chernev (2008) only as part of a grouped introductory citation to show that relatively little prior work has examined purchase quantity decisions. The article does not discuss Chernev's quantity-matching heuristic, findings, measures, or boundary conditions when developing hypotheses, methods, or interpretations. Because the citation serves broad background positioning rather than a distinct functional role in the argument, it is best classified as a passing mention.
